TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Alexis_Ajinça, title = Alexis_Ajinça, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alexis_Ajinça} }

S.FORM: == Alexis Ajinça == u siwkay niza tatama, nalecuhan i 1988 amihcan 5 a bulad 6 a demiad, Alexis Ajinça, miunduay, mimali i Amilika NBA. u France kanatal a tademaw ciniza. 2008 a mihcan, mapili' nu Siyalothe Sanmaw putiput. ayza sa mimali i Niwauoliang Tihu putiput. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alexis Ajinça is a French professional basketball player for the New Orleans Pelicans of the National Basketball Association (NBA). He is a 7 ft 2 in (2.18 m), 248 lb (112 kg) center.
S.PHON: == ar~ɾə*is ajin*a == u siwkaj niza tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan i **** amiħʦan * a bur~ɾad * a dəmiad, ar~ɾə*is ajin*a, miunduaj, mimar~ɾi i amir~ɾika nba. u franʦə kanatar~ɾ a tadəmaw ʦiniza. **** a miħʦan, mapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ nu sijar~ɾotħə sanmaw putiput. ajza sa mimar~ɾi i niwauor~ɾiaŋ tiħu putiput. kakuniza kar~ɾunasur~ɾitan-sur~ɾu u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika ar~ɾə*is ajin*a is a frənʦħ profəssionar~ɾ baskətbar~ɾr~ɾ pr~ɾajər for tħə nəw orr~ɾəans pər~ɾiʦans of tħə nationar~ɾ baskətbar~ɾr~ɾ assoʦiation (nba). ħə is a * ft * in (*.** m), *** r~ɾb (*** kg) ʦəntər.
S.FORM: == Alexis Ajinça == u siwkay niza tatama, nalecuhan i 1988 amihcan 5 a bulad 6 a demiad, Alexis Ajinça, miunduay, mimali i Amilika NBA. u France kanatal a tademaw ciniza. 2008 a mihcan, mapili' nu Siyalothe Sanmaw putiput. ayza sa mimali i Niwauoliang Tihu putiput. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alexis Ajinça is a French professional basketball player for the New Orleans Pelicans of the National Basketball Association (NBA). He is a 7 ft 2 in (2.18 m), 248 lb (112 kg) center.
S.PHON: == ar~ɾə*is ajin*a == u siwkaj niza tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan i **** amiħʦan * a bur~ɾad * a dəmiad, ar~ɾə*is ajin*a, miunduaj, mimar~ɾi i amir~ɾika nba. u franʦə kanatar~ɾ a tadəmaw ʦiniza. **** a miħʦan, mapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ nu sijar~ɾotħə sanmaw putiput. ajza sa mimar~ɾi i niwauor~ɾiaŋ tiħu putiput. kakuniza kar~ɾunasur~ɾitan-sur~ɾu u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika ar~ɾə*is ajin*a is a frənʦħ profəssionar~ɾ baskətbar~ɾr~ɾ pr~ɾajər for tħə nəw orr~ɾəans pər~ɾiʦans of tħə nationar~ɾ baskətbar~ɾr~ɾ assoʦiation (nba). ħə is a * ft * in (*.** m), *** r~ɾb (*** kg) ʦəntər.
